ogTitle: Kintore vs Knuckey Lagoon: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kintore and Knuckey Lagoon.
heading: Kintore vs Knuckey Lagoon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kintore, Northern Territory and Knuckey Lagoon, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Knuckey Lagoon has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Kintore (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kintore or Knuckey Lagoon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kintore has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Knuckey Lagoon scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kintore scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Knuckey Lagoon scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kintore or Knuckey Lagoon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Knuckey Lagoon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
